name: hc_clean_row_count
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.hc_clean

name: hc_clean_missing_patient_id
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.hc_clean WHERE patient_id IS NULL OR BTRIM(patient_id) = ''

name: hc_clean_allowed_le_submitted
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.hc_clean WHERE CASE WHEN BTRIM(allowed_amount) ~ '^[+-]?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$' AND BTRIM(submitted_amount) ~ '^[+-]?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN allowed_amount::numeric > submitted_amount::numeric ELSE FALSE END

name: hc_missing_patient_id
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.hc_missing_data WHERE patient_id IS NULL OR BTRIM(patient_id) = ''

name: hc_format_dob_iso
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.hc_format_errors WHERE CASE WHEN BTRIM(dob) ~ '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$' THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(BTRIM(dob), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') <> BTRIM(dob) ELSE TRUE END

name: hc_format_effective_date_iso
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.hc_format_errors WHERE CASE WHEN BTRIM(effective_date) ~ '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$' THEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(BTRIM(effective_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') <> BTRIM(effective_date) ELSE TRUE END

name: hc_format_submitted_amount_numeric
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.hc_format_errors WHERE NOT (BTRIM(submitted_amount) ~ '^[+-]?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$')

name: hc_constraint_future_service_date
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.hc_constraint_errors WHERE CASE WHEN BTRIM(service_date) ~ '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$' THEN TO_DATE(BTRIM(service_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD') > CURRENT_DATE ELSE FALSE END

name: hc_constraint_effective_date_le_end_date
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.hc_constraint_errors WHERE CASE WHEN BTRIM(effective_date) ~ '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$' AND BTRIM(end_date) ~ '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$' THEN TO_DATE(BTRIM(effective_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD') > TO_DATE(BTRIM(end_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD') ELSE FALSE END

name: hc_constraint_allowed_le_submitted
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.hc_constraint_errors WHERE CASE WHEN BTRIM(allowed_amount) ~ '^[+-]?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$' AND BTRIM(submitted_amount) ~ '^[+-]?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN allowed_amount::numeric > submitted_amount::numeric ELSE FALSE END

name: hc_constraint_approved_le_submitted
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.hc_constraint_errors WHERE CASE WHEN BTRIM(approved_amount) ~ '^[+-]?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$' AND BTRIM(submitted_amount) ~ '^[+-]?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN approved_amount::numeric > submitted_amount::numeric ELSE FALSE END

name: hc_constraint_valid_blood_type
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.hc_constraint_errors WHERE blood_type NOT IN ('A+', 'A-', 'B+', 'B-', 'AB+', 'AB-', 'O+', 'O-')

name: fin_clean_row_count
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.fin_clean

name: fin_clean_missing_amount
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.fin_clean WHERE amount IS NULL OR BTRIM(amount) = ''

name: fin_clean_currency_usd
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.fin_clean WHERE currency <> 'USD'

name: fin_missing_amount
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.fin_missing_data WHERE amount IS NULL OR BTRIM(amount) = ''

name: fin_type_amount_numeric
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.fin_type_errors WHERE NOT (BTRIM(amount) ~ '^[+-]?[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$')

name: fin_range_currency_usd
source_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS violation_count FROM dqv_pg_demo_20260429.fin_range_errors WHERE currency <> 'USD'
